plugins.name: etak-discovery
plugins.description: Product discovery skills — explore customer needs, map the opportunity space, brainstorm solutions, surface and test assumptions.

skills.name: orient
skills.description: Find your bearings — think out loud, reflect, make sense of half-formed observations.

skills.name: explore
skills.description: See what's in the opportunity space, notice gaps, brainstorm possibilities.

skills.name: sound
skills.description: Probe beneath the surface — surface and examine hidden assumptions.

skills.name: critique
skills.description: Stress-test ideas and opportunities from multiple angles.

skills.name: prioritize
skills.description: Converge — rank options and decide where to focus.

skills.name: experiment
skills.description: Design tests, run them, record results, propagate learning.

agents.name: product-researcher
agents.description: Competitive research, market trends, and opportunity space analysis.

plugins.name: etak-develop
plugins.description: Software development skills — scope validated ideas into work items, plan and sequence delivery, write technical specs and ADRs, implement with TDD.

skills.name: survey
skills.description: Home base — navigate the work graph, see what's ready, blocked, or stalled.

skills.name: plan
skills.description: Scope ideas, decompose into workstreams and epics, sequence milestones, map dependencies.

skills.name: spec
skills.description: Write technical specifications grounded in the codebase and record architectural decisions.

skills.name: assess
skills.description: Stress-test work — readiness, feasibility, sizing, AC refinement, test planning.

skills.name: test
skills.description: Strategy-first testing — plan coverage, write tests at the right layer, run and debug.

skills.name: build
skills.description: Interactive implementation — TDD pairing with the engineer in the loop.

agents.name: architect
agents.description: Autonomous technical design — specs, ADRs, alternatives, grounded in the codebase.

agents.name: tech-lead
agents.description: Orchestration — fills gaps, dispatches agents, coordinates delivery across phases.

agents.name: developer
agents.description: Autonomous implementation using TDD in isolated worktrees.
